hero.sub: I architect high-performance digital environments. From server-side logic to immersive WebGL interfaces, I bridge the gap between abstract code and tactile user experiences.

services.label: Core Engineering
services.title: Front‑End Focused Full‑Stack
services.desc: End-to-end web applications built on React, Next.js, and Node.js. My primary focus is delivering pixel-perfect, highly interactive front-end UIs backed by scalable REST APIs.

services.label: Immersive Experiences
services.title: 3D Web & WebGL Engineering
services.desc: Interactive 3D experiences powered by Three.js and React Three Fiber. Product configurators, immersive e-commerce, and WebGL-powered storytelling that converts visitors into buyers.

services.label: Technical Leadership
services.title: Software Documentation & Architecture
services.desc: Comprehensive technical documentation, system design, and software specifications that bridge the gap between complex engineering and stakeholder clarity. Clear thinking, scalable systems.

services.label: App Engineering
services.title: Cross-Platform Mobile Apps
services.desc: High-performance native and cross-platform mobile apps built with React Native and Flutter. Smooth gestures, offline support, and App Store / Google Play deployment.

services.label: Cloud Engineering
services.title: DevOps & Cloud Architecture
services.desc: Scalable, secure cloud deployment on AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. Automated CI/CD pipelines, serverless infrastructure, database optimization, and high availability systems.

services.label: UI / UX Design
services.title: Figma Prototyping & Design
services.desc: High-fidelity UI/UX design and interactive prototyping using Figma. I translate complex product requirements into beautiful, user-centric interfaces that seamlessly transition into production-grade front-end code.

projects.label: EdTech · Full‑Stack · E‑Learning
projects.title: CourseCraft
projects.tagline: Learn job-ready skills. Earn real certificates.
projects.desc: A full-stack e-learning platform offering free and paid courses across technology, business, and design. Features user authentication, instructor admin dashboard, Stripe payments, certificate generation on completion, and a modern learning experience.

projects.label: AI · 3D WebGL · Knowledge Graph
projects.title: Synapse
projects.desc: An interactive AI-powered 3D knowledge mapping and visualization platform. Synapse takes any topic and generates an interconnected concept graph, allowing users to explore relationships in a custom 3D web-space or a 2D flowchart with dynamic drag-and-merge functionality.

projects.label: AgriTech · Full‑Stack
projects.title: Dairy Farm Management
projects.desc: A comprehensive system for dairy farms — track livestock, monitor milk production, manage sales & revenue, and track expenses through a beautiful real-time dashboard with role-based access.

projects.label: Marketplace · Auctions
projects.title: Car Bidding Platform
projects.desc: A real-time auction marketplace for prestigious vehicles. Live bidding, secure payments, verified ownership records, and a sleek marketplace UI for a seamless buying experience.

projects.label: E‑Commerce · Auto Parts
projects.title: Auto Care
projects.tagline: Your one-stop shop for quality auto parts.
projects.desc: A live e-commerce platform connecting users to trusted auto parts vendors. Features smart oil-grade recommendations, category browsing, secure checkout, coupon system, and real-time WhatsApp support.

about.title:
Precision Engineering.
Immersive Interface.
Digital Architecture.
bioParagraphs: I architect high-performance digital environments. From server-side logic to immersive WebGL interfaces, I bridge the gap between abstract code and tactile user experiences.
With deep expertise in React, Next.js, and Three.js, I don't just build websites—I engineer interactive data visualizations and digital luxury experiences that captivate and convert.
Every system I design is built to scale. Every interface I craft is engineered for performance. This is the intersection of logic and aesthetic.
